title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 84.850 - Police department — certain contracts with municipal government
text:
84.850.  Police department — certain contracts with municipal government. — The police may contract with the municipal government of such cities for the performance of any of the following functions:  Purchasing, building maintenance and auditing, which functions are common to the two authorities.
(L. 1943 p. 727 § 7683)
